spec_match.rationale: Effectively illustrates the spec contracts and practical trade-offs of each quality tier using accurate estimated metrics.

interactive.rationale: Includes rich interactivity with dynamic card selection and a fully functional decision wizard that generates tailored code recommendations.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page content and tools perfectly align with the description of a quality-vs-latency tradeoff visualizer and wizard.

edge_cases.rationale: Explicitly covers failure modes, environmental noise limits, and speaker diarization capabilities across all models.

references.rationale: Directly links to the ChromeStatus feature page and cites the spec-defined behaviors.

design_system.rationale: Strictly adheres to the design system, styling components beautifully using CSS variables and custom typography.
